name: Vegetarian Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onions and green peppers; cook for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the cooked brown rice, beans, and barbecue sauce.
4. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes until heated through.
5. Serve on whole grain buns.
Each serving provides:
542 calories
19.2 g of protein
9.4 g of fat
96.4 g of carbohydrates
3.2 g of dietary fiber
17 mg of cholesterol
1637 mg of sodium.
